loadFlow: 1. IM-809-sandbox-load.apex: CatalogItem -> POS_Purchase -> ClientPurchase -> Sale_Item (Item_Price=$18 GROSS, Qty=1, Tax_2=10.25%) -> POS_Discount (Custom/Amount/$18/-$1.80).
2. IM-809-discount-source-probe.apex: cycled Discount_Source through Manual/Applied/Custom/Fundraising Events Online - none triggered propagation.

3. IM-809-manual-propagation.apex: directly updated Sale_Item to post-propagation state (Discount_Type=Amount, Discount_Value=$1.80, Discount_Amount=-$1.80, Price_Without_Tax=$16.20, Amount=$17.86, Tax_Amount=$1.66). Rollups computed correctly.

pos_discount.note: POS_Discount data shape preserved exactly as PR pos_discount_only_shop.sql projects.

sale_item.note: Target state reached via MANUAL Sale_Item update (IM-809-manual-propagation.apex), NOT via auto-propagation. Sale_Item.Item_Price=$18 GROSS preserved (PR sale_item.sql change validated). The manually-set discount fields stuck (SaleItem_Trg did NOT reset them on UPDATE path).

client_purchase.note: Total2=$17.86 matches Altru exactly. Total=$16.06 differs from $17.86 (likely a separate formula path - Total2 is the canonical 'matches Altru' field per the dev story).

pos_purchase.note: POS_Purchase.Total=$17.86 matches Altru exactly. Shop_Discount_Amount=-$1.80 rolled up correctly from POS_Discount.

triggerPropagationFinding.summary: The Auctifera package's ClientPurchaseTriggerHandler.propagateDiscount does NOT auto-fire on insert/update of POS_Discount in IllinoisTrainingsSandbox under our fixture. Target reconciliation state was reached by manually netting Sale_Item via direct Apex update.
tested: Insert POS_Discount with Discount_Source in {Manual, Applied, Custom, Fundraising Events Online} - none triggered propagation
Update POS_Discount to set Value__c=18 - no propagation
Link POS_Discount.Sale_Item__c to S-0007 - no propagation
AsyncApexJob WHERE CreatedDate=TODAY shows zero jobs with methodName like '%propagat%'
triggerPropagationFinding.what_worked: Manually updating Sale_Item.Discount_Type='Amount', Discount_Value=1.80, Discount_Amount=-1.80, Price_Without_Tax=16.20, Amount=17.86, Tax_Amount=1.66 via Apex DML. The downstream rollups (ClientPurchase.Total2, POS_Purchase.Total) compute correctly from this state.
triggerPropagationFinding.interpretation: The migration tool in production may use a post-insert step (touch / @future / batch) not documented in PR 121 that triggers propagation. OR the dev's sandbox test used a different load mechanism. Either way: PR data shape is correct, downstream formulas are correct, only the auto-propagation step needs dev clarification.
